creator: kmjones@blueyonder.co.uk
text:
Hi,

With reference to this PR (now closed), I was the original submitter of 
this PR but it was closed because my e-mail address had changed.

It turns out that I'm still getting the odd pop and crackle with the 
current (4.7-RC) version of the newpcm/emu10k1 driver, but nowhere near 
the kind of distortion that I used to get (i.e. it's merely slightly 
irritating, as opposed to painful). I don't use this card in anger 
anymore, so it's probably safe to leave this closed unless someone else 
raises it.

Keith
